settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Tune how you show up, what pings you, and how targets stay aligned—built for reps who live in motion.
settings.identityDesc: How your name appears on boards and in the field.
settings.currencyHint: Dashboards, sales desk, challenges, and pipeline totals use this format. Saved with your profile.
settings.notificationsDesc: Stay in the loop without drowning in noise.
settings.notifSalesDesc: Wins, logs, and nudges tied to your pipeline.
settings.notifChallengesDesc: Heads-up when challenge entries you follow change state.
settings.notifDigestDesc: One calm summary—never a flood of email.
settings.commandConsoleIntro: Org-wide people, industry tags, and activity—same tools as before, now living here so you do not hunt another route.
settings.fieldAlignmentDesc: Targets and product lines power Quick Add and the sales desk—keep names crisp so reporting stays trustworthy.
settings.fieldAlignmentBody: Your personal target card above mirrors what you see beside logged sales—one source of truth for the week and month.
settings.targetAssignmentsDesc: Set or adjust goals for people you coach.
settings.noTargetsYet: No targets yet—create one to give the team a clear number to chase.
settings.personLockedHint: Person and scope stay the same here—adjust dates, period, or amount.
settings.amountStoredHint: Stored as USD equivalent (1 USD = {rate} ETB).
settings.deleteTargetConfirm: Remove this target? Your dashboard will use the next best match.
